name: HubSpot
description: Contact history and dedup before any draft (read-only).

description: Triage, routing, briefs, drafts, and fail-closed gate.

name: Gmail
description: Email drafts ready for review. Never auto-sent.

name: Slack
description: Notifies the sales owner when an account moves to human review.

name: Granola
description: Call history to enrich relational context.

name: Notion
description: Tracking of activated accounts and ongoing processes.
